MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER WELLS FARGO ADVISORS, LLC's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon - Judge Goldsmith recuses himself. Pursuant to the order of the presiding judge, the motion is transferred to be heard by Judge Kramer in department 303. The moving party shall call the clerk of department 303 at (415) 551-3726 to schedule a new hearing date. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)
